connect.title: Connect your Lay-Z-Spa
connect.description: Enter the share code from your Bestway Smart Hub app to add your spa to Homey.

steps.1: Open the Bestway Smart Hub app
steps.2: Go to your spa → ··· → Share Device
steps.3: Copy the share code (starts with RW_Share_)

error.link_failed: Could not connect. Please check the share code and try again.
error.no_devices: No devices found after linking. Make sure your spa is set up in the Bestway Smart Hub app.

repair.title: Re-link your Lay-Z-Spa
repair.description: Enter a new share code to restore the connection.

error.login_failed: Login failed on all servers (EU, US, Global). Please check your email address and password.
error.fetch_devices_failed: Could not fetch devices from the Bestway cloud.
error.no_devices: No devices found in your Bestway account. Make sure your spa is set up in the Bestway Smart Hub app.

relogin.title: Update Bestway credentials
relogin.description: Enter your Bestway credentials to restore the connection.

error.control_failed: Could not send command to the spa. Please check the connection.
error.credentials_missing: Login credentials are missing. Please remove and re-add the device.
error.hydrojet_not_supported: HydroJet is not supported by this spa model.
error.lock_not_supported: Panel lock cannot be toggled via the app for this spa model. It can only be changed on the physical control panel.
